thread.title: Former Sen. Fred Harris shares lifelong sense of fulfillment | Lifestyle | abqjournal.com
thread.title_full: Former Sen. Fred Harris shares lifelong sense of fulfillment | Lifestyle | abqjournal.com

author: David Steinberg/For the Journal
title: Former Sen. Fred Harris shares lifelong sense of fulfillment | Lifestyle | abqjournal.com
text:
Fred Harris can point to many achievements in his long public life.
In his new book, “Report from a Last Survivor,” Harris writes that he considered three of those achievements he was proudest of. And they were accomplished outside the U.S. Senate, where he served two terms representing Oklahoma.
